description_long: This monument features a dramatic bronze sculpture of a winged female figure standing atop a lion, both mounted on a multi-tiered stone pedestal. The pedestal is covered in graffiti and inscriptions, with several plaques and engraved panels visible on its faces. The base is broad and stepped, constructed from stone or concrete, and is also heavily marked with graffiti. The winged figure holds an object aloft, possibly a torch or laurel, and the lion is depicted in a dynamic, striding pose. The overall structure is weathered, with visible signs of urban wear and public interaction. The monument stands as a prominent urban landmark, blending classical sculptural elements with contemporary street art.
description: A large, multi-tiered stone monument with a bronze winged figure and lion atop, heavily covered in graffiti and inscriptions. The base is broad and stepped, with visible plaques and urban wear.
description_view_0: The left side of the monument shows the winged figure and lion in profile, with extensive graffiti on the pedestal and base.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main engraved panel and the forward-facing lion, with the winged figure holding an object aloft.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the sculpture and more graffiti, with the stepped base clearly visible.
description_view_3: The right side reveals another inscribed panel and the lion's tail, with large graffiti text on the base.
attribute_inscription: Multiple inscriptions and engraved panels are visible on the pedestal, primarily on the front and right sides. The text is in Spanish, with varying legibility due to graffiti overlay. Some panels appear to be official plaques, while others are hand-written or spray-painted.
attribute_ornamentation: The monument is highly ornamented with a large bronze sculpture of a winged female figure and a lion atop the pedestal. The sculpture is detailed and classical in style, with dynamic poses and flowing forms.
attribute_base_design: The base is a broad, multi-tiered stone or concrete platform with several steps leading up to the pedestal. It is rectangular with beveled edges and is heavily covered in graffiti. The structure appears solid and robust, designed to support the weight of the sculpture above.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is formed by the raised arm of the winged figure, holding an object (possibly a torch or laurel). The finish is metallic and detailed, with the figure's wings spread wide for dramatic effect.
attribute_surrounding_features: The monument is set on a large, stepped platform with no visible fencing or vegetation immediately adjacent. The surrounding area appears to be paved, with no other notable features present.
